infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AthleteOS uses the camera to capture profile photos and supporting training media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AthleteOS uses your photo library to update your profile and attach documents.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: AthleteOS reads health data to personalize recovery and readiness insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: AthleteOS may write wellness activity summaries with your consent.
